text_path="/mnt/data/file-GVesg6zaCBqxavtu2Dxivs-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(text_path,"r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
    s=f.read()
len(s)

# Let's search for Quranic ayah cues and hadith cues and quotes
import re
cues_ayah=["قال الله تعالى","يقول الله","الآية","كما قال تعالى","سورة","(4:3)","القرآن","إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ"]

cues_hadith=["قال النبي","النبي ﷺ","في الحديث","رواه","أخرجه","صلى الله عليه وسلم","قال رسول الله","عن النبي"]
# collect spans that are between quotes “ ... ” or " " but here text uses Arabic quotes
# We'll identify occurrences of phrases that look like Quranic ayah quotes in quotes.
spans=[]

for i in range(len(s)):
    pass

matches_ayah=[m for m in re.finditer(r"قال الله تعالى|يقول الله|الآية|كما قال تعالى|سورة|القرآن|إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ", s)]
len(matches_ayah)

for m in matches_ayah:
    print(m.start(), m.group(), s[m.start()-20:m.start()+60])

import re
# find quoted spans
quotes = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', s)]
len(quotes), quotes[:3]

for i,(a,b,txt) in enumerate(quotes):
    print(i, txt)

# Build spans: for each quote text, determine its inner matn, and locate in s
results=[]

for idx,(a,b,full) in enumerate(quotes):
    inner=full.strip('"')
    # locate first occurrence
    pos = s.find(inner)
    if pos==-1:
        continue
    end = pos+len(inner)
    # classify as Ayah or Hadith by cues in the inner text
    t="Ayah" if any(c in inner for c in ["يّمْحُو","يَمْحُو","الْكِتَاب","وَأَنْفِقُوا"]) else "Hadith"
    # Better: ayah if inner starts with "يَمْحُو" or contains "الآية" not reliable. We'll simple: if inner starts with "يَمْحُو" or contains "وَأَنْفِقُوا" it's ayah. The easier: we already know which quotes correspond: first is ayah; second is ayah; third is hadith; the others are hadith repeated. We'll map by idx: 0->Ayah, 1->Ayah, 2->Hadith, 3-15 Hadith
    typ = "Ayah" if idx in (0,1) else "Hadith"
    results.append({"start":pos,"end":end,"span_text":inner,"citation_type":typ})
len(results)

# compute all occurrences for each inner text
occurrences=[]

for inner in [q[2].strip('"') for q in quotes]:
    pos = 0
    while True:
        idx = s.find(inner, pos)
        if idx==-1: break
        end = idx+len(inner)
        occurrences.append((idx,end,inner))
        pos = idx+1

len(occurrences), occurrences[:5]

target="ما من يوم يصبح العباد فيه إلا ملكان ينزلان، فيقول أحدهما: اللهم أعط منفقا خلفا، ويقول الآخر: اللهم أعط ممسكا تلفا"
positions=[(m.start(),m.end()) for m in re.finditer(re.escape(target), s)]
positions[:5], len(positions)

# collect spans precisely using positions we found for target long hadith and others
spans=[]
# ayah 1
spans.append({"start":104,"end":170,"span_text":"يَمْحُو اللَّهُ مَا يَشَاءُ وَيُثْبِتُ وَعِنْدَهُ أُمُّ الْكِتَابِ","citation_type":"Ayah"})
# ayah 2
spans.append({"start":227,"end":358,"span_text":"وَأَنْفِقُوا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَلَا تُلْقُوا بِأَيْدِيكُمْ إِلَى التَّهْلُكَةِ وَأَحْسِنُوا إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ","citation_type":"Ayah"})
# hadith 1
spans.append({"start":428,"end":447,"span_text":"ما نقصت صدقة من مال","citation_type":"Hadith"})
# hadith 2
spans.append({"start":552,"end":642,"span_text":"ثلاثة لا ينالهم الله بشفاعتي يوم القيامة: مدمن خمر، وعاق، ومن زعم أنه لا حاجة له في النساء","citation_type":"Hadith"})
# long hadith occurrences
target="ما من يوم يصبح العباد فيه إلا ملكان ينزلان، فيقول أحدهما: اللهم أعط منفقا خلفا، ويقول الآخر: اللهم أعط ممسكا تلفا"
base_positions=[(783,896),(1023,1136),(1263,1376),(1503,1616),(1743,1856),(1983,2096),(2223,2336),(2463,2576),(2703,2816),(2943,3056),(3183,3296),(3423,3536)]
# verify count 12
len(base_positions)
